title: Vegan Mediterranean Bean Gratin
description: A flavorful, plant-based take on the classic French dish, featuring roasted Mediterranean vegetables and creamy long beans.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the garlic and olive slices until fragrant.
Add the sliced roasted red peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix the vegan cream cheese and chopped parsley.
Combine the cooked pepper mixture and cream cheese mixture.
Add the trimmed long beans to the mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
